creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Hallo Yves Gu~rin,

> I was trying to install the gimp ports and I got this circular dependency
> I attached the install.log.

Thanks.

gimp-app-2.6.8_1,1
 +-- gegl-0.0.22
  +-- sdl-1.2.14_1,2
   +-- arts-1.5.10_3,1
    +-- jackit-0.116.2_3
     +-- doxygen-1.6.3
      +-- graphviz-2.26.3
       +-- devil-1.7.8_4,1
        +-- sdl-1.2.14_1,2


Fixes, choose on of the below

1. In /usr/ports/graphics/devil
	make config
	(deselect SDL, which is default off)

2. In /usr/ports/devel/doxygen
	make NOPORTDOCS=yes

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
- [dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org],[dirk.meyer@guug.de],[dinoex@FreeBSD.org]
http://people.freebsd.org/~dinoex/errorlogs/
